goals.title: Tracker Operations
goals.question: What tracker, dashboard, exporter, or automation changes are needed to keep the research dashboard accurate, useful, and publishable?
goals.scope_note: Cross-cutting operational goal for dashboard feature prep, worker steering, exporter changes, and scheduled publication visibility.

goals.title: Sociologie de l'habitat
goals.question: Which legally usable images, maps, datasets, scans, and supplemental PDFs are most valuable for researching sociologie de l'habitat, and where can they be fetched with provenance and licensing?
goals.scope_note: Start with high-value non-text assets and supplemental files that materially improve understanding of habitat, housing forms, spatial patterns, and social context. Prefer legal, reusable, well-attributed sources.

queue_items.question: Collect 5-10 high-value legal assets for sociologie de l'habitat: images, maps, datasets, scans, and supplemental PDFs. Record provenance, license status, relevance reason, and local paths when fetched.

workers.purpose: Evidence extraction with claims, citations, locators, and confidence.
workers.dispatch_note: Own answer-ready evidence from fetched text or PDFs.

workers.purpose: Targeted translation for non-English source segments.
workers.dispatch_note: Use only when language blocks extraction or review.

workers.purpose: Discovery, ranking, dedupe, and metadata normalization.
workers.dispatch_note: Own discovery, canonical ids, and relevance scoring.

workers.purpose: Collection of images, maps, datasets, scans, and supplemental files.
workers.dispatch_note: Own non-text artifacts with licensing and provenance.

workers.purpose: Gap analysis, scope drift review, and next-question proposals.
workers.dispatch_note: Use after batches or when progress stalls.

workers.purpose: Main orchestrator for intake, dispatch, synthesis, and publication.
workers.dispatch_note: Own queue shaping, daily reports, publishing, and cross-worker retries.

workers.purpose: Legal full-text access checks and fetch tracking for evidence-bearing sources.
workers.dispatch_note: Own access-state transitions and local fetch provenance.

workers.purpose: Dashboard and data-contract steward for tracker features and backfills.
workers.dispatch_note: Own dashboard feature requests, data requirements, worker steering, and tracker readiness.

dashboard_features.title: Publish in-progress worker research early
dashboard_features.implementation_note: User explicitly authorized early publication of DB-ready intermediate worker outputs on the dashboard while tasks remain running or blocked.

dashboard_features.title: Dashboard changes steer workers and data contracts
dashboard_features.implementation_note: Dashboard requests must create data-contract and worker-steering updates before the UI depends on new fields.

dashboard_features.title: Pipeline view includes future programmed tasks
dashboard_features.implementation_note: Expose scheduled research automations in the Pipeline tasks view alongside live queue items.

scheduled_tasks.name: research-tracker-publisher
scheduled_tasks.description: Export, validate, and publish the research tracker to the public GitHub Pages repo when it changes

scheduled_tasks.name: philip-daily-research
scheduled_tasks.description: Daily Philip research orchestration for the research workspace
